order_items_exactly_one_catalog_referenc.name: order_items_exactly_one_catalog_reference_check
order_items_exactly_one_catalog_referenc.value: ("order_items"."menu_item_id" is not null and "order_items"."combo_id" is null) or ("order_items"."menu_item_id" is null and "order_items"."combo_id" is not null)

payout_accounts_exactly_one_owner_check.name: payout_accounts_exactly_one_owner_check
payout_accounts_exactly_one_owner_check.value: ("payout_accounts"."user_id" is not null and "payout_accounts"."restaurant_id" is null) or ("payout_accounts"."user_id" is null and "payout_accounts"."restaurant_id" is not null)

payout_items_exactly_one_source_check.name: payout_items_exactly_one_source_check
payout_items_exactly_one_source_check.value: (case when "payout_items"."restaurant_earning_id" is not null then 1 else 0 end + case when "payout_items"."delivery_id" is not null then 1 else 0 end + case when "payout_items"."commission_id" is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 1

payout_requests_exactly_one_beneficiary_.name: payout_requests_exactly_one_beneficiary_check
payout_requests_exactly_one_beneficiary_.value: ("payout_requests"."user_id" is not null and "payout_requests"."restaurant_id" is null) or ("payout_requests"."user_id" is null and "payout_requests"."restaurant_id" is not null)

payouts_exactly_one_beneficiary_check.name: payouts_exactly_one_beneficiary_check
payouts_exactly_one_beneficiary_check.value: ("payouts"."user_id" is not null and "payouts"."restaurant_id" is null) or ("payouts"."user_id" is null and "payouts"."restaurant_id" is not null)
